calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-28-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: RONALD M. ARLAS ESQ FOR PLAINTIFF MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC. WITH RICHARD REHL, BUILDING MANAGER
DEFENDANT JACK CORTES IN PRO PER

THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE THIS DAY. ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT AS INDICATED ABOVE. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT WERE READ AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT OWES THE SUM OF $2,550.00 BACK RENT FROM AUG THRU OCT 2004 AT $850.00 PER MONTH, PLUS $334.00 COSTS FOR A TOTAL OF $2,884.00. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY NOVEMBER RENT ON NOVEMBER 15, 2004 WITH NO GRACE PERIOD. BEGINNING DECEMBER 2004, PAYMENT IS DUE ON THE FIRST AND DELINQUENT ON THE FIFTH.
ON DECEMBER 15, 2004, DEFENDANT WILL PAY $184.00 TOWARD ARREARAGES. ON JANUARY 15, 2005, DEFENDANT WILL PAY $300.00 TOWARD ARREARAGES, AND ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL ARREARAGES ARE PAID IN FULL. ALL PAYMENTS SHALL BE IN CASHIER'S CHECKS RECEIVED IN THE MANAGERS OFFICE AT 685 MCALLISTER ST, APT. # 110. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY, PLAINTIFF MAY, WITH 24 HR NOTICE, REQUEST AN EX PARTE JUDGMENT FOR 685 MCALLISTER ST, APT. 201 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94104 FOR ALL AMOUNTS DUE PLUS $140.00 COSTS. PLAINTIFF WILL DISMISS THE CASE IF ALL PAYMENTS ARE MADE AS SPECIFIED. IF JUDGMENT IS ENTERED, DEFENDANT FORFEITS SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $950.00, WHICH SHALL BE CREDITED FIRST TOWARD ANY DAMAGES, THEN TOWARD ANY AMOUNTS OWING. DEFENDANT WAIVES FINAL ACCOUNTING. IF JUDGMENT IS ENTERED, DEFENDANT SHALL LEAVE THE PREMISES IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION. DEFENDANT REPRESENTS THAT HE IS THE SOLE ADULT OCCUPANT OF THE PREMISES FROM FEBRUARY 1, 2004 TO THE PRESENT. NO SUBLEASING IS PERMITTED. IF THE CASE IS DISMISSED, THEN PARAGRAPH 15B OF THE LEASE CONTROLS. DEFENDANT WAS ADVISED OF THE POTENTIAL FOR ONE WEEK STAY OF EXECUTION, BUT WAIVES ANY FURTHER STAY.
JPT WILLIAM CHEN, CLERK CLARK BANAYAD, REPORTER MITCH LYON (218)
